dimensions.description: The most important user corrections, explicit preferences, and key decisions from the conversation were identified and extracted as memories.
Memories are correctly scoped: cross-project user preferences under scope=user, repository-specific patterns under scope=workspace. Misscoped or unscoped memories score low.
Memory statements are concise, declarative, and insight-only. Raw transcript excerpts, verbose summaries, and tautological observations score low.

Communication and collaboration preferences are extracted with useful applies_when guidance, concrete examples or preferred formats, and context-aware normalization of broad instructions like always/never.
The most impactful signals in the conversation were captured. Important patterns are not silently dropped. Repetitive minor detail omissions are acceptable.
